analysis.reasoning: Core message: EU leaders are coordinating on COVID-19, stressing international solidarity on vaccine access and discussing operationalizing COVAX with WHO's Tedros; the EU will contribute. EU1: Does not highlight EU’s historic success or lessons learned—mostly operational now, so not supported. EU2: Mentions EU leaders VTC but does not explicitly emphasize unity or agreement among member states—weak/implicit at best; not clearly promoted. EU3: Focus is global vaccine access, not specifically benefits within the EU—does not fit. EU4: No claim of EU as pioneer/regulatory avant-garde—absent. EU5: Not about human rights/democracy causes—no. EU6: Yes—emphasizes multilateralism, international solidarity, COVAX cooperation, and the EU playing its part globally to overcome the pandemic, which aligns with the EU contributing to a better world.
